title: Create Copper Tweaks
description: Small changes to the new Create copper textures
body:
In the 6.0.0 update of Create mod, the textures of everything made of copper were changed to fit the vanilla copper blocks. But some of the new textures do not look great. This resourcepack changes some textures, specifically pipes, to make them look a bit better

![Screenshot of the changed textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gCKZg2VS/images/f9db9a89d5697dc041593d4c1276f1f291d1a9a1.png)
